sentences.target: Ich bin schwanger und sehr müde.

translations.de: Ich bin schwanger und sehr müde.
translations.en: I am pregnant and very tired.
translations.fr: Je suis enceinte et très fatiguée.
translations.vi: Tôi đang mang thai và rất mệt.
translations.nl: Ik ben zwanger en heel moe.
translations.hi: मैं गर्भवती हूँ और बहुत थकी हुई हूँ.
translations.pl: Jestem w ciąży i bardzo zmęczona.
translations.nb: Jeg er gravid og veldig trøtt.
translations.sv: Jag är gravid och väldigt trött.
translations.da: Jeg er gravid og meget træt.
translations.ja: 妊娠していて、とても疲れています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite copular auxiliary (present, 1st sg) linking the subject to a predicative complement.
Predicative adjective functioning as a subject complement with the copula.
Coordinating conjunction linking two predicative adjectives.
Degree adverb intensifying the following adjective.
Predicative adjective (second coordinated subject complement) modified by 'sehr'.

sentences.target: Meine Schwester ist im fünften Monat schwanger.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ ɪst ɪm ˈfʏnftən ˈmoːnat ˈʃvaŋɐ/

translations.de: Meine Schwester ist im fünften Monat schwanger.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ ɪst ɪm ˈfʏnftən ˈmoːnat ˈʃvaŋɐ/
translations.en: My sister is five months pregnant.
translations.es: Mi hermana está de cinco meses.
translations.fr: Ma sœur est enceinte de cinq mois.
translations.it: Mia sorella è incinta di cinque mesi.
translations.ru: Моя сестра на пятом месяце беременности.
translations.pt: Minha irmã está grávida de cinco meses.
translations.vi: Chị gái tôi mang thai được năm tháng.
translations.nl: Mijn zus is vijf maanden zwanger.
translations.uk: Моя сестра на п’ятому місяці вагітності.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन पाँच महीने की गर्भवती है.
translations.pl: Moja siostra jest w piątym miesiącu ciąży.
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου είναι στον πέμπτο μήνα εγκυμοσύνης.
translations.nb: Søsteren min er fem måneder på vei.
translations.sv: Min syster är gravid i femte månaden.
translations.ro: Sora mea este însărcinată în luna a cincea.
translations.cs: Má sestra je v pátém měsíci těhotenství.
translations.da: Min søster er fem måneder henne.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing with 'Schwester' (fem sg, nominative); part of the subject NP.
Common noun; head of the subject NP (nominative singular, feminine).
Finite copular auxiliary (present, 3rd sg) linking the subject to a predicative complement.
Contracted preposition ('in dem'); governs dative and introduces the PP specifying stage/time.
Ordinal adjective in dative masculine singular (weak inflection), modifying 'Monat'.
Head noun of the PP (dative singular masculine) as complement of 'im'.
Predicative adjective (subject complement) licensed by the copula.

sentences.target: Du bist schwanger und sehr nervös.

translations.de: Du bist schwanger und sehr nervös.
translations.en: You are pregnant and very nervous.
translations.fr: Tu es enceinte et très nerveuse.
translations.pt: Você está grávida e muito nervosa.
translations.vi: Bạn đang mang thai và rất lo lắng.
translations.nl: Je bent zwanger en heel zenuwachtig.
translations.hi: तुम गर्भवती हो और बहुत घबराई हुई हो.
translations.pl: Jesteś w ciąży i bardzo zdenerwowana.
translations.nb: Du er gravid og veldig nervøs.
translations.sv: Du är gravid och väldigt nervös.
translations.da: Du er gravid og meget nervøs.
translations.ja: 妊娠していて、とても不安です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite copular auxiliary (present, 2nd sg) linking the subject to a predicative complement.
Predicative adjective functioning as a subject complement.
Coordinating conjunction linking two predicative adjectives.
Degree adverb intensifying the following adjective.
Predicative adjective (second coordinated subject complement) modified by 'sehr'.

sentences.target: Meine Frau ist schwanger und sehr glücklich.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə fraʊ̯ ɪst ˈʃvaŋɐ ʊnt zeːɐ̯ ˈɡlʏklɪç/

translations.de: Meine Frau ist schwanger und sehr glücklich.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə fraʊ̯ ɪst ˈʃvaŋɐ ʊnt zeːɐ̯ ˈɡlʏklɪç/
translations.en: My wife is pregnant and very happy.
translations.es: Mi esposa está embarazada y muy feliz.
translations.fr: Ma femme est enceinte et très heureuse.
translations.it: Mia moglie è incinta e molto felice.
translations.zh-Hans: 我妻子怀孕了，非常开心。
translations.ru: Моя жена беременна и очень счастлива.
translations.pt: Minha esposa está grávida e muito feliz.
translations.vi: Vợ tôi đang mang thai và rất hạnh phúc.
translations.nl: Mijn vrouw is zwanger en heel blij.
translations.uk: Моя дружина вагітна і дуже щаслива.
translations.hu: A feleségem terhes, és nagyon boldog.
translations.hi: मेरी पत्नी गर्भवती है और बहुत खुश है.
translations.pl: Moja żona jest w ciąży i bardzo szczęśliwa.
translations.el: Η γυναίκα μου είναι έγκυος και πολύ χαρούμενη.
translations.nb: Kona mi er gravid og veldig glad.
translations.id: Istri saya hamil dan sangat bahagia.
translations.sv: Min fru är gravid och väldigt lycklig.
translations.ro: Soția mea este însărcinată și foarte fericită.
translations.cs: Moje žena je těhotná a velmi šťastná.
translations.da: Min kone er gravid og meget glad.
translations.fi: Vaimoni on raskaana ja todella onnellinen.
translations.ja: 妻は妊娠していて、とても幸せです。
